title: The MISSING: J.J. Macfield and the Island of Memories

notes:
The game is completable but there are a few caveats:

Alt-tabbing causes the game to not recognize input anymore after bringing it back  in front until a restart of the game.
I had a crash near the end of the game (Something something virtual call error message) but after restarting and redoing it from the last checkpoint I was able to finish it.
Sadly there seems to be a problem with the fmv (?) effects in the short intro/outro video and the skyboxes which just stay blank. It's not gamebreaking and I didn't  even notice during my playthrough that the skyboxes where broken, but looking at some video footage afterwards, it did look very bleak in comparison.

I was also not able to get a ps3 controller to work including different setups with Steams builtin controller support and xboxdrv. In the end I just mapped the controller inputs to keys which worked fine.

There were no problems with performance.
title: The MISSING: J.J. Macfield and the Island of Memories
